title: National Port Shutdown
description: A labor dispute shuts down the nation's largest shipping port, halting imports and exports.

A.title: Intervene and force ports to reopen

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: A port shutdown bleeds billions daily. We need to get goods moving again.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Forcing ports open violates workers’ rights. Negotiation is the only ethical path.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: This is a national security issue. Supply chains are critical infrastructure.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Negotiation keeps the economy stable without escalating tensions.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Stability means nothing if we trample on labor rights.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Rights don’t matter if the nation runs out of essential supplies.
